equivalence_argument: No complete implementation mapping was found in the audited local repo set: Missing regular async builder duplicate checking with job_exists_and_active; scheduled builder and verifier active-job checks are present, but the regular short-async collection path does not reject duplicate commitments only on active jobs.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing regular async builder duplicate checking with job_exists_and_active; scheduled builder and verifier active-job checks are present, but the regular short-async collection path does not reject duplicate commitments only on active jobs.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/lib.rs uses decide_active_job_augmentation backed by job_exists_and_active for synthesized scheduled obligations.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs rejects async commitments only when job_exists_and_active returns true, allowing missing or expired jobs to proceed.
crates/ritual-async-registry/src/lib.rs implements job_exists_and_active so expired jobs return Ok(false).

The regular async path in crates/ethereum/payload/src/lib.rs proceeds through validate_short_commitment_parent_state, which checks executor capability and wallet lock but does not call job_exists_and_active for the origin tx hash.
should_skip_sender_locked_tx is a nonce-lock predicate and uses job_exists for fulfillment allowance; it is not the required regular async duplicate-commitment active-job check.

rationale: The commit replaces job_exists with job_exists_and_active in all three consensus-critical duplicate-check locations named in the commit message. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Payload builder scheduled and regular async collection, and block verifier async commitment validation, must reject duplicate commitments only when job_exists_and_active is true; when it is false because the job is missing or expired, the async commitment may proceed.
suggested_falsification_tests: Provide builder and verifier state where jobExecutor is non-zero but expiryBlock is <= current block; assert neither path rejects the commitment as a duplicate, then set expiryBlock > current block and assert both reject/skip.
summary: Active-job duplicate checks are only partial, so this invariant is a confirmed gap.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Put an active AsyncJobTracker job for a regular async origin tx hash, then build a payload with the same original transaction; current local code should reach commitment construction because the regular path has no origin-hash job_exists_and_active precheck.
title: Builder and verifier use active-job duplicate checks
